items.briefing:
Australia's new Office of AI launched this week, prompting renewed calls from industry experts for clearer standards around AI security, data protection, and fraud prevention. Australian organisations — including registered training providers — are being urged to strengthen cyber resilience as AI adoption grows, with particular attention to how AI tools handle sensitive data and infrastructure.

Scam activity remains an ongoing concern for Australian staff and students. Be alert to fraudulent emails, fake invoices, or impersonation attempts, which continue to target individuals and businesses alike.

**Practical tip:** Before using any AI tool for work, check with your manager that it's approved — never enter student or staff personal data into an unauthorised platform.

featured.title: Partnered Health confirms cyber incident affecting patient information across national clinic network
featured.quote: Major Australian healthcare provider suffers cyber incident exposing patient data nationally.
